created_at.description: The time at which this resource was created.

custom_field_settings.description: Array of custom field settings applied to the portfolio.

allOf.description: The latest `status_update` posted to this portfolio.

due_on.description: The localized day on which this portfolio is due. This takes a date with format YYYY-MM-DD.

start_on.description: The day on which work for this portfolio begins, or null if the portfolio has no start date. This takes a date with `YYYY-MM-DD` format. *Note: `due_on` must be present in the request when setting or unsetting the `start_on` parameter. Additionally, `start_on` and `due_on` cannot be the same date.*

allOf.description: *Create-only*. The workspace or organization that the portfolio belongs to.

permalink_url.description: A url that points directly to the object within Asana.

public.description: True if the portfolio is public to its workspace members.

default_access_level.description: The default access level when inviting new members to the portfolio

privacy_setting.description: The privacy setting of the portfolio. *Note: Administrators in your organization may restrict the values of `privacy_setting`.*

project_templates.description: Array of project templates that are in the portfolio
